features.name: part_select_on_wire
features.description: Code should include a part-select operation on a wire using constant expression as range bounds, e.g., wire0[(2'h2):(1'h0)]

features.name: concatenation_with_unsized_literal
features.description: Code should include concatenation with unsized single-bit literal, e.g., {wire4, reg7, reg6, reg5, (1'h0)}

features.name: width_mismatch_in_cell_output
features.description: Code should include signals of different widths driving the same expression output, creating width mismatch that triggers splitcells edge case

features.name: reduction_or_with_reg
features.description: Code should include reduction OR operator (~|) applied to a register in a ternary expression

features.name: signed_cast_of_wider_signal
features.description: Code should include $signed cast applied to a signal that is wider than its destination in an assignment
